subject: A merfolk wizard mid-incantation, body twisting as ribbons of water and energy spiral around him
description: A blue-skinned merfolk wizard stands on rocky ground with arms thrown wide as ribbons of glowing water and arcane energy swirl around his body in a vortex. He wears layered robes in deep blues and teals with golden trim and ornamentation, and his head is crowned with fin-like or coral-like protrusions. The pose is dynamic and ceremonial, body arched as he channels a wave of force. The background is a bright, almost overexposed pale teal-white sky suggesting open coastal expanse, with hints of distant landscape elements. Light is high-key and diffuse, washing the scene in cool tones.
foreground: merfolk wizard in robes channeling spiraling water magic
background: bright pale teal-white sky, indistinct coastal vista
